GenAiFunction.description: Edits an existing native Salesforce report via the Analytics API. Identify the report with reportId (preferred) or reportName. Only the fields you supply are changed — everything else on the report is left as-is. Supports renaming, changing columns, format (TABULAR/SUMMARY/MATRIX), groupings, filters (single, multi, or boolean logic), date filters (including clearing with "NONE"), scope, folder, cross-filters, buckets, and formulas.
